title: MyCodexVantaOS Capability Definition
description: Schema for entries in governance/capability-set.yaml. Based on naming-spec-v1.md 5.5.

id.description: 5.5 — Canonical capability-id. Vendor names are forbidden.

allowedProviderPattern.description: Regex pattern that provider names for this capability must match.

stable.description: Whether this capability is stable in the canonical set.
